title: Petrol price hike: Akhilesh Yadav jabs Modi govt over fuel cost rise, austerity appeal – ‘cycle hi vikalp hai’
description: The cartoon depicts Akhilesh Yadav, the leader of the Samajwadi Party, riding a bicycle, his party's symbol. Akhilesh is passing by a large billboard that conveys a message from the Prime Minister, ‘Spend less on petrol: PM.’
